init_hook: echo 'Welcome to the Garmin Watch Face Devbox!'
echo '  devbox run build - Compile the watch face'
echo '  devbox run sim   - Start the Connect IQ simulator'
echo '  devbox run run   - Run the compiled watch face in the simulator'

scripts.test: devbox run build && devbox run run
scripts.test-fr255: devbox run build-fr255 && devbox run run-fr255
